caption:
Every service business runs on one of four levels of lead response.

Level 0: no process. Whoever notices, responds, if anyone does.

Level 1: manual, whenever. Same-day or next-day, depending on the front desk.

Level 2: manual, under an hour. One person owns it and treats it like a priority.

Level 3: automated, under 5 minutes. A text fires the second the lead lands, before a human touches it.

Most owners believe they sit at Level 2. Many sit at Level 1 instead.

Find your level. Then move up one.

DM TOOLS

#ServiceBusiness #LeadGeneration #SmallBusinessGrowth #HomeServices #SpeedToLead
rationale: Carousels currently lead saves and depth for B2B authority content, and this ships an unclaimed maturity-ladder framework distinct from the self-score, forensic diagnostic, and triage models already covered.
